name: Bread Pudding
description: A traditional British baked bread pudding with suet, dried fruit, golden syrup and spice — eaten hot or cold.

ingredients.name: soft brown sugar
ingredients.notes: original: 3 oz; source spelling 'sofe brown Sugar' corrected

ingredients.name: grated nutmeg
ingredients.notes: to taste; no quantity stated in source

ingredients.name: caster sugar
ingredients.notes: for sprinkling after baking; not listed in source ingredient list — added from method

steps.title: Soak the bread
steps.content: Soak {0001} in cold water in a basin overnight.

steps.title: Drain the bread
steps.content: Squeeze the water out of the bread through a colander, then transfer to a large mixing bowl.

steps.title: Mix the pudding
steps.content: Add {0002}, {0003}, {0005}, {0006} and {0007} to the bread and mix. Add {0009}, {0010} and {0004}. Mix thoroughly.

steps.title: Bake
steps.content: Transfer the mixture to a large, shallow, greased ovenproof dish. Bake at 180°C/Gas Mark 4 for about 1¼–1½ hours. Turn the heat down after 1¼ hours if needed.

steps.title: Finish and serve
steps.content: Once cooked and cooled, sprinkle with {0011}. Serve hot or cold.

notes:
No yield stated — base_servings left null.

Requires overnight soaking of the bread before cooking.

Original recipe in imperial; all weights converted to metric using the standard British cookbook conversion table. Originals retained in ingredient notes.

_fixture_notes.external_ref: Supplied slug 'bread-pudding' used verbatim; not re-derived.
_fixture_notes.imperial_conversion: All weights converted per the standard table: 1 lb → 450g; 3 oz → 85g (×3 ingredients); 8 oz → 225g. Original values retained in ingredient notes for traceability.
_fixture_notes.cook_time_minutes: No labelled cook field. Stated bake duration: 'about 1¼–1½ hrs' — range, lower bound 75 minutes. cook_time_minutes set to 75. The overnight soak is out-of-session (explicitly overnight); goes in notes, not cook_time_minutes. No other stated step durations.
_fixture_notes.prep_time_minutes: No labelled prep field and no stated numeric prep duration apart from the overnight soak (out-of-session). Left null.
_fixture_notes.overnight_soak_timer: Step 1 soak timer set to null — overnight duration is not an in-session countable seconds value and the spec's timer_seconds field is for in-session waits. Duration captured in step content and top-level notes.
_fixture_notes.base_servings: No yield stated in source. Left null per the servings-not-stated convention.
_fixture_notes.caster_sugar_method_only: Caster sugar appears only in the method close ('sprinkle with caster sugar') and is absent from the ingredient list. Added as a full ingredient row (0011) with amount null and notes recording the source omission, per the method-only optionals convention.
_fixture_notes.grated_nutmeg: 'Grated nutmeg' — 'grated' is a prep verb in the spec's scope. However, 'grated nutmeg' functions as a canonical spice form in British baking, analogous to 'ground cumin' which the spec explicitly excludes from the leading-prep-modifier conversion. Treated as a canonical-identity modifier; left as 'grated nutmeg'. Flagged for operator review.
_fixture_notes.nutmeg_quantity: No quantity stated for grated nutmeg in source. Amount null, notes 'to taste'.
_fixture_notes.soft_brown_sugar_typo: Source spells 'sofe brown Sugar' — corrected to 'soft brown sugar' in the name field. Logged here.
_fixture_notes.dietary_category: Suet is rendered beef or mutton fat — not vegetarian. Classified 'meat'.
_fixture_notes.dietary_restrictions: Gluten: bread. Dairy: milk. Eggs: egg. Suet is animal fat but has no corresponding restriction code in the spec's listed codes (dairy, gluten, eggs, nuts, peanuts, soy, shellfish, sesame). Not flagged as a restriction; dietary_category 'meat' conveys the animal-product content.
_fixture_notes.cuisine: Traditional British bread pudding — characteristically British in style, ingredients, and origin. 'british' assigned.
_fixture_notes.no_source: Source is a handwritten or plaintext document with no attribution. source field left null.
_fixture_notes.no_derived_components: Batch mode — no derived components proposed. No reusable component candidates in a simple baked pudding.
